surfaces.name: CliqueAI validator W&B dashboard
surfaces.notes: Public Weights & Biases project for SN83 CliqueAI validator runs (entity toptensor-ai, project CliqueAI). Explicitly documented as the subnet's "W&B Dashboard" in the official toptensor/CliqueAI repo (docs/wandb_logging.md), which also defines the structured per-run logging schema (WandbRunLogData) written to this project. Publicly readable (W&B access USER_READ, 66+ logged validator runs); the same GitHub org (toptensor) owns both the SN83 source repo and this W&B entity.
